positive: Minimalist nature portrait featuring a stylized, bold silhouette of a forest scene at dawn. The foreground showcases interlocking abstract shapes representing pine branches and mountain peaks, rendered with high contrast black and white lines. Behind the silhouette, incorporate soft, radiating gradient color washes of deep indigo and vibrant cerulean blue, suggesting a mystical sky. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical, centered, and highly scalable for apparel printing. Use a crisp, clean vector art style with visible edges, strong graphical elements, and a sense of depth achieved through negative space. The overall mood is tranquil, powerful, and deeply stylized. Studio lighting, vector illustration, symmetrical composition, print-ready.
